title: Append a row to exising sheet
author: sudha53633
body:
Hey ,

Nice to use exceljs, great job!

I'm trying to add a row with existing xlsx file, that has alreday 100 rows of data. Can i append row data from 101 row? if yes , give me headsup for updateing the excel file

Thanks,
Sudhakar G
